title: [FIRRTL] width infer (asSInt(UInt(#))) mismatch
body:
The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp73: SInt
    tmp73 <= asSInt(UInt("h1088"))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
// Standard header to adapt well known macros to our needs.

module top_mod(
  output [13:0] tmp73);

  assign tmp73 = 14'h1088;	// a_top_mod.fir:2:3, :4:14
endmodule
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [12:0] tmp73
);
  assign tmp73 = -13'shf78;
endmodule
```

`Yosys 0.9+3911 (git sha1 4b31223e, clang 11.0.1 -fPIC -Os)` reports formal mismatch:

```
ERROR: Can't match gold port `tmp73_gold' to a gate port.
```
